name: Molasses Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Blend in the molasses.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, ground ginger, ground cloves or cinnamon, and salt.
4. Add the sifted ingredients alternately with warm water to the creamed mixture.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Do not over-bake; the cookies will be moist and soft.
